name: King Polytechnic Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: King Polytechnic Engineering Co., Ltd. operates as an integrated engineering and construction company in Taiwan and internationally. Its services include project planning, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, project management, and turnkey services. The company offers process, civil and structure, piping, equipment, electrical, mechanical, instrument and control, fire protection, and environmental protection work solutions for petrochemical and chemical industries. It also plans, designs, and constructs HVAC systems, cleanrooms, biological cleanrooms, air abatement systems, purified water systems, gas systems, and chemical systems, as well as provides electrical, automatic control, monitoring, fire protection, water supply and drainage, pipeline, air conditioning system, purified water system, gas system, chemical system, and hook-up services for high-tech, microelectronics, electronics, flat panel, semiconductors, optoelectronics, biotechnology, and pharmaceutical industries. In addition, the company offers planning, design, and construction services for various types of infrastructure and public work projects; and constructs green buildings, as well as constructs commercial high-rise buildings, deluxe residential buildings, five-star hotels, luxury recreation villas, and public construction projects. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
